sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 168 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to non-prosecution. 13.05.2026 Mr. Imtiaz Ali Solangi, advocate for the applicant. Learned counsel states that the question proposed has already been decided against the applicant department by virtue of Supreme Court judgment passed in Commissioner Inland Revenue Lahore vs. Millat Tractors Limited, Lahore and others reported as 2024 SCMR 700. In view hereof, reference application is dismissed. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
